_comment: Burst-disk kits use a special format: <prefix>.<size>.<material>/<burstpressure><variant>. Example: 44201.10.5/xx001. Source: ENS-System WV-SV-Kombinationen.xlsx, sheet BS-Kit.

44201.labelEn: Burst-disc assembly (housing + KUB disc + monitoring connection G1/4" + G1/8")

44202.labelEn: Screwed burst disc (disc + flat gaskets + clamping sleeve LH/RH)

_variantNote: After the slash: <burst-pressure-or-XX><variant-3chars>. 'XX' = burst pressure to be specified. Numeric forms vary in length, so the variant is matched as the trailing 3 chars.

031.labelDe: Aufnahme für DIN-Flansch Form C DIN 2526, KUB +/-10%
031.labelEn: Housing for DIN flange form C DIN 2526, KUB ±10%

041.labelDe: Aufnahme für ANSI-Flansch 300lb RF, KUB +/-10%, metr. Schrauben
041.labelEn: Housing for ANSI 300lb RF flange, KUB ±10%, metric screws

081.labelEn: Housing for ANSI 150lb RF flange, KUB ±10%

091.labelDe: Aufnahme für Flansch EN 1092-1 Form B1, KUB -0/+10%
091.labelEn: Housing for EN 1092-1 form B1 flange, KUB -0/+10%

0A1.labelEn: Housing for ANSI 300lb RF flange, KUB ±5%

0B1.labelDe: Aufnahme für EN 1092-1, KUB -0/+10%, Schrauben 5.6, Muttern 5
0B1.labelEn: Housing for EN 1092-1 flange, KUB -0/+10%, screws 5.6 / nuts 5
